---
title: "Stack"
description: >-
  Computational biology and software engineering: omics analysis, sequencing
  technologies, programming, machine learning, databases and infrastructure.
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
The tools I work with, and the methods I use them for.
:::

## Computational biology

::: {.spec .reveal}
::: {.spec-row}
[Omics analysis]{.spec-label}
[Genomics, transcriptomics, RNA biology (isoforms, polyadenylation, APA sites,
modifications, splicing), phylogenetic analyses, variant calling]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Sequencing technologies]{.spec-label}
[Illumina, Oxford Nanopore, PacBio]{.spec-value}
:::
:::

## Software engineering & DevOps

::: {.spec .reveal}
::: {.spec-row}
[Programming]{.spec-label}
[R (tidyverse, data.table, Bioconductor), Python (pandas, SciPy, scikit-learn,
Keras, TensorFlow/PyTorch), Bash]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Machine learning]{.spec-label}
[Predictive modelling, deep learning, model development, validation and
deployment for biology]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Data visualisation & reporting]{.spec-label}
[Interactive dashboards and graphics: ggplot2, shiny, plotly, rmarkdown,
streamlit]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Software development]{.spec-label}
[Creator of and contributor to openly available bioinformatic tools:
[ninetails](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails),
[nanotail2](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB),
[NanoQuRe](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/NanoQuRe),
[rDNAmine](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/rDNA_mine)]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Databases]{.spec-label}
[SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL)]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Infrastructure]{.spec-label}
[Docker, Kubernetes, cloud platforms (Azure)]{.spec-value}
:::
::: {.spec-row}
[Best practices]{.spec-label}
[Version control (Git), reproducible research]{.spec-value}
:::
:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> See it applied</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
:::
